query: Could you create a 7-day travel plan for a group of 8, starting from Rockford and visiting 3 cities in Florida from March 8th to March 14th, 2022? The budget allocated for this trip is $17,000. The accommodation preference is to have entire rooms for the group.

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Rockford to Gainesville, duration: 16 hours 30 mins, distance: 1,822 km, cost: 91
plan.attraction: Florida Museum of Natural History-Exhibits; Devil's Millhopper Geological State Park;
Kanapaha Botanical Gardens; Sweetwater Wetlands Park;
plan.dinner: Tapri The Chai Books Cafe, Gainesville

plan.attraction: Cade Museum for Creativity & Invention; Matheson History Museum;
plan.dinner: Aahar Meat and Chicken Shop, Gainesville

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Gainesville to Daytona Beach, duration: 2 hours 2 mins, distance: 158 km, cost: 7
plan.accommodation: Homey 1BR in Fun, Central West Village w/ Doorman by Blueground, Daytona Beach

plan.attraction: World's Most Famous Beach; Daytona Beach Main Street Pier;
plan.lunch: Rocks on the River, Daytona Beach
plan.accommodation: Homey 1BR in Fun, Central West Village w/ Doorman by Blueground, Daytona Beach

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Daytona Beach to Jacksonville, duration: 1 hour 28 mins, distance: 143 km, cost: 7
plan.attraction: Jacksonville Zoo and Gardens; MOSH (Museum Of Science & History);
plan.accommodation: Gorgeous Garden Apt Steps To Park, Jacksonville

plan.transportation: self-driving, from Jacksonville to Rockford, duration: 16 hours 42 mins, distance: 1,852 km, cost: 92
